text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few days after the Kikuka Sho...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I've made a decision.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Meet me in an hour. I'll send the location to your
cell phone.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ding! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My screen lights up and I see where she wants me
to go.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: There you are, Trainer. Are you prepared for this?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
We're about to go on a journey worthy of a
king—one which ends in becoming first-rate.

text_block_list.name: Regular Spectator
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Is that Umamusume running today? Why's
she here though?

text_block_list.name: Gossipy Fan
text_block_list.text:
That's not just some Umamusume! That's the nepo
baby! She ran in the Kikuka Sho!

text_block_list.name: Regular Spectator
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you're right. Hmm? I don't remember hearing
about her running...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, the spectators are gathering. The bait is
working.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: What I need to aim for is...

text_block_list.name: Magazine Journalist
text_block_list.text: Whoa! The nepo baby! She's really here?

text_block_list.name: Paparazzi
text_block_list.text: I found her! I'll be the first to get her on record!

text_block_list.name: Paparazzi
text_block_list.text:
I can see it now! "Nepo Baby Runs Amok in Her
Signature Racewear!" It'll go perfectly with the
latest news about her mother.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ohohoho! The media's all here!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Trainer! It's time for my media greeting routine!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, don't act like you don't remember. Come
on!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, are you surprised? This is my new call and
response routine for greeting the media!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
That's why you need to remember the chant too!
When I ask "What's my name?", you answer with
"King!"

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Come now, we don't have time. It's showtime for
my adoring public!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: What's my naaame?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: She's the smartest of them all, and?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Tch! And the wisest! So naturally...
choice_data_list: She's first-rate and admired by everyone!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: That's right! And who stands on top of the world?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
The fastest! The strongest! She walks her own
path! The one and only first-rate...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The crowd mutters among themselves.

text_block_list.name: Magazine Journalist
text_block_list.text: Wh-what was that? A... self introduction?

text_block_list.name: Paparazzi
text_block_list.text: Hehe, not bad! Not bad! I love that kind of thing!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Attention, all the media gathered here! Prepare
for a special announcement concerning my next
objective!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I will take first place in the Takamatsunomiya
Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Magazine Journalist
text_block_list.text:
Takamatsunomiya?! But that's a sprint! What
happened to your plan for the Classics?!

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
A sudden change of course! Wow! This will be a
great topic for our lunchtime talk show!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Please! This is not your ordinary change in plans.
My path was like this from the beginning.

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
But what about your mother's fans? Surely they'll
be disappointed.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. I have nothing to do with my mother's fan
base. I walk my own path, with my own fans.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
The past is the past, and now is now. I must rid
myself of unnecessary bindings.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I have my own strength, and that's more than
enough.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Why, you ask? Because I'm a first-rate Umamusume! But I won't stop there—I'll surpass everything and everyone to become a super first-rate Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text: Super first-rate?

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Well then, please, tell us! What made you decide
to run in the Takamatsunomiya Kinen?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
How about... to herald the coming of spring
before the spring Tenno Sho?

text_block_list.name: Magazine Journalist
text_block_list.text:
Huh? What does that even mean? Seems rather
impulsive to me.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, have I piqued your interest? Come now,
ask me all your questions.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'm granting all of you the right to an interview!
Ohohohoho!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
King Halo proudly makes her announcement much
to the frustration and fascination of the crowd of
reporters.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her triumphant, trademark laugh, she
readies herself to deviate from the conventional
path which brought her here.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Now then, Trainer. Can you get to preparing my
new training schedule for sprints right away?
choice_data_list: You've got a lot of work ahead of you.
You've got a lot of work ahead of you.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Of course. After making such a declaration, I'm
prepared to even crawl through mud if I have to.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
One might say I'm doing a complete one-eighty
now that I've finished the Triple Crown tour.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
But even despite the sudden change in route, I'm
about to stand on the grand G1 stage.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure everyone will have their own opinions.
People will want to compare me to Special Week,
who doesn't go against the grain.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
But I won't quit now—not when I haven't even
tried yet.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'll keep putting in the effort to walk my own
path.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
No matter what perils are ahead of me, I'll be the
one laughing victoriously at the end.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Yes! Let's give it our all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
King Halo is running faster than ever before, and
our next objective becomes the
Takamatsunomiya Kinen.
